name: Recipe Crafting
description: Recipe Crafting is a production mechanic that turns resources, recipes, or stations into usable items or upgrades.
design_notes: Recipe Crafting should be designed around a clear player promise, a readable trigger, and a predictable result. For crafting mechanics, the important design work is deciding when the mechanic is allowed, how much commitment it creates, what feedback confirms success, and what counter-pressure keeps it from solving every situation. Strong tuning makes the mechanic feel intentional even when it is used repeatedly or combined with adjacent systems.
design_purpose: Give the player a readable way to use recipe crafting as part of the core loop.
Create meaningful choices around timing, cost, risk, positioning, or long-term planning.
Connect recipe crafting to adjacent systems so it supports the larger game design instead of acting as an isolated feature.
player_fantasy: The player feels prepared by turning gathered resources into useful capability.

parameters.name: craft_time
parameters.description: Time before the crafted output becomes available.

parameters.name: output_quantity
parameters.description: Number of items produced by one craft action.

edge_cases: Recipe Crafting is triggered during a scene transition, pause, respawn, or save/load boundary.
Recipe Crafting overlaps with another high-priority state such as damage, stun, dialogue, menu focus, or cutscene control.
Recipe Crafting runs at extreme frame rates, high latency, very large coordinates, or after long play sessions.
common_bugs: Recipe Crafting state does not reset correctly after interruption or reload.
Feedback for Recipe Crafting plays even when the mechanic fails or is rejected.
Recipe Crafting produces different results between frame rates, platforms, or network clients.
balancing_notes: Make Recipe Crafting strong enough to justify attention but limited enough that other mechanics keep their purpose.
Tune costs, cooldowns, ranges, and feedback together; changing only one number can shift the mechanic from optional to dominant.
accessibility_notes: Provide clear visual, audio, or haptic feedback when Recipe Crafting becomes available, succeeds, or fails.
Avoid relying on a single sensory cue or extremely narrow timing unless the game offers assists or alternate settings.

implementation_notes.unity: Implement Recipe Crafting with engine-agnostic state first, then bind it to MonoBehaviour, CharacterController, Rigidbody, UI Toolkit, or Netcode systems as appropriate.
implementation_notes.godot: Model Recipe Crafting as a node or resource-driven state and update deterministic pieces from _physics_process when timing or collision matters.
implementation_notes.unreal: Implement Recipe Crafting with Actor Components, CharacterMovement, Gameplay Ability System, UMG, or replicated gameplay state depending on the mechanic scope.
implementation_notes.web: Implement Recipe Crafting as data-owned state updated from the main loop; keep rendering, input, and simulation boundaries explicit for Canvas, Phaser, Three.js, or custom JavaScript.
